markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To review new strategic process changes and provide client account updates.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Technical SEO audits are now mandatory for all clients.** This is a non-negotiable best practice to prevent technical debt from undermining content performance, even if not explicitly in the contract.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [**ME/EM collaboration is now required for content strategy.** This Week 2 process aims to give MEs more strategic input, provide EMs with an expert review, and improve content quality by aligning on goals upfront.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [**The calibration article is moving to Week 2.** This change provides more time for client feedback, de-risking the entire content production pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [**A custom Notion PM tool is launching next week.** It will replace the current Kanban board, providing clear client and personal task views to improve project tracking and client health monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)

## Topics

### New Strategic Processes

  - [**Technical SEO Audits**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
      - [**Decision:** Now a mandatory best practice for all clients.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prevents technical debt (e.g., broken links, poor site structure) from undermining content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
      - [**Action:** William will confirm Talal has bandwidth to perform these audits for all new clients.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [**ME/EM Collaboration on Content Strategy**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
      - [**Change:** MEs and EMs will now build the content strategy together in Week 2.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [**Goal:** Foster a "micro-team" partnership, giving MEs more strategic input and providing EMs with an expert review to "poke holes" in the plan before client presentation.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
          - [EMs prepare initial data (e.g., competitor CSVs, cluster analysis).](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
          - [EMs and MEs hold a 1-hour brainstorm call to finalize the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
          - [EMs record a Loom presentation for team review, with MEs available to answer questions.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
          - [EMs remain the sole client-facing presenter.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
      - [**Workload:** Acknowledged as more work for MEs, but framed as an investment that improves content quality and reduces rework.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
  - [**Calibration Article Moved to Week 2**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
      - [**Change:** The calibration article is now due by the end of Week 2.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Provides more time for client feedback, de-risking the production pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
      - [**Impact:** If clients are highly responsive, more articles may be published by the end of the sprint. This is a positive outcome, as the goal is to deliver maximum value and build a strong case for the growth phase.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [**Project Management Tool**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
      - [**Change:** A custom Notion PM solution is being built to replace the current Kanban board.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
      - [**Launch:** Expected next week.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
      - [**Features:** Client and personal task views, client health monitoring, and dependency tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [**Escalation & Health Signals**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [**Change:** New SOPs are being developed for escalation paths and defining Sprint Health Signals (Green, Yellow, Red).](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [**Goal:** Ensure clear, consistent reporting on client health, a shared ME/EM responsibility.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)

### Client Account Updates

  - [**Blaxel**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
      - [**Status:** Performance is good (indexed, clicks, citations), but technical content (GPU inference, LLM hosting) requires many revisions for accuracy and messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Balancing SERP intent with Blaxel's specific product capabilities (e.g., they don't offer GPU).](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
      - [**Solution:** Implement a new workflow step to audit content for product messaging alignment. For pricing, use general terms ("usage-based pricing") and link to official sites to avoid outdated info.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2243.0)
  - [**Turnstile**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2384.0)
      - [**Status:** Verbally confirmed renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2384.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Client is unhappy with content quality and requests access to edit artifacts directly in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2403.0)
      - [**Action:** Update Notion artifacts to reflect all changes made in Atlas and grant client edit access.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2403.0)
  - [**Brex**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2544.0)
      - [**Status:** Verbally confirmed renewal; contracts are being sent.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2544.0)
      - [**Action:** Joel is prepping templates and index pages for the new web experience and resource hub.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2544.0)
  - [**Ramp**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2595.0)
      - [**Status:** Working on fan-out articles. The client meeting was moved to tomorrow, providing more time to gather AI visibility wins.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2595.0)
  - [**Nivon**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2684.0)
      - [**Status:** Converted. William is building a 2-3 month content prioritization framework.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2684.0)
      - [**Action:** Victor to monitor Airtable for client comments approving drafts for publication.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2713.0)
  - [**CRV**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2847.0)
      - [**Status:** Major blocker. The Week 2 calibration article is unreviewed in Week 5, creating a 9-article backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2847.0)
      - [**Action:** William will schedule a real-time call with the client to review the article together.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2917.0)
  - [**Panther**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)
      - [**Status:** Client is happy with quality.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)
      - [**Action:** Victor will publish 3 articles tomorrow. The client's web agency will provide customizable CTA blocks.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)
  - [**Talera**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=3128.0)
      - [**Status:** Going well. CTA banners are ready.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=3128.0)
      - [**Guidance:** Keep competitor mentions factual and highlight Talera's strengths. Focus on quality for the Preply comparison article.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=3139.0)
      - [**Action:** William will request Amplitude access to track performance.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=3196.0)
  - [**Nebrex**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=3208.0)
      - [**Status:** Calibration article is being staged.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=3208.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Sanity CMS is a significant bottleneck. Internal linking requires manual page selection, not just pasting URLs, which can take hours.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=3218.0)
      - [**Action:** Ade will rework one article next week. For now, keep internal links to a minimum to mitigate the staging bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=3218.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
      - [Confirm Talal has bandwidth for mandatory technical SEO audits.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
      - [Schedule a real-time review call with the CRV client for the calibration article.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2917.0)
      - [Request Amplitude access from the Talera client.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=3196.0)
  - [**William & Andy:**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=3086.0)
      - [Sync on a process to proactively secure client attribution data (e.g., Amplitude access) as part of the handoff to the growth team.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=3086.0)
  - [**Ifeoluwa:**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2437.0)
      - [Update Notion artifacts for the Turnstile client to reflect all changes from Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2437.0)
  - [**Victor:**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)
      - [Publish 3 articles for the Panther client tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)
      - [Monitor Airtable for Nivon's draft approval comments.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=2713.0)
  - [**Ade:**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=3208.0)
      - [Rework one article for the Nebrex client next week.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=3288.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
      - [Implement the new Week 2 ME/EM content strategy collaboration process.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [Plan for the calibration article in Week 2 for all new clients.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
      - [Prepare for the custom Notion PM tool launch next week.](https://fathom.video/share/-crpQ3oiDxPHJySM7ZHPyfkHz6dnKY64?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
